822 ETHNCTY_CUBN_CD ETHNCTY_CUBN_CD A1005D Ethnicity: Yes, Cuban CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident's ethnicity is Cuban. -=Not assessed/no information

823 ETHNCTY_OTHR_HSPNC_CD ETHNCTY_OTHR_HSPNC_CD A1005E Ethnicity: Yes, another Hispanic/Latino/Spanish CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident's ethnicity is another Hispanic, Latino/a, or Spanish origin. -=Not assessed/no
